e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A live witness training cycle can now carry witness-state active samples, source-backed oracle labels/processes, a 12-sample heldout window, capability liveness, model eval senses, native teacher-retirement proof, and the resulting world-model growth state as one Form-native receipt.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form-native training-cycle receipt; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Witness-state counters lower into observed active-sample senses.
A source-backed emission cycle with twelve heldout rows is accepted and can retire one sampled oracle teacher when native reaches the teacher.
Capability liveness blocks the cycle embodiment status when the app is not running.
Hidden vulnerability still holds growth even when the live witness cycle is source-backed.
